findings.title: Command count 72 vs spec overview's 74
findings.issue: Spec overview mentions 74 commands but actual count is 72. Difference of 2 not traceable to specific missing commands. No AC specifies exact count.
findings.suggestion: Update spec overview to reflect actual count. Not a functional issue.
